_doc: Auto-generated by generate_scenario.py — manifest hand-tightened: match strings strip shell redirects and `-o` paths so substring matching tolerates whatever flags the agent passes; docsai consolidated to a single passthrough rule.

rules._doc: docsai queries always passthrough — query strings vary between runs.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by `rules` returns an empty array. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
